name: auto-dev-preference-advisor
description: Tiny, behavior-aligned SUGGESTION provider for the auto-dev loop (advisory only).

scripts._comment_test: Node >=22 runs TypeScript natively via type-stripping; no build step for the numeric core.

dependencies._comment: Only needed once the LLM-judge / brainstorm / Reflexion stubs in advisor.ts + ingest.ts are wired. The numeric core (bt.ts) has ZERO dependencies. Note: the Agent SDK authenticates with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY only (NOT the Claude subscription OAuth token).
